entities.name: V
entities.context: Vrijen Attawar, the subject whose operational health protocols are described

entities.name: Morning Planning Protocol
entities.context: Daily routine framework that checks sleep, stimulant choice, caffeine cutoff, and nutrition

entities.name: Deficit Mode
entities.context: Flagged operational state triggered when sleep score <70 or <6hrs

entities.name: Vyvanse
entities.context: Stimulant medication chosen for long-focus days

entities.name: Adderall
entities.context: Stimulant medication chosen for days requiring flexibility

entities.name: Caffeine Cutoff Protocol
entities.context: Strict 2pm caffeine cutoff due to slow CYP1A2 metabolism compounded by stimulant use

entities.name: CYP1A2 Slow Metabolizer
entities.context: Genetic variant indicating slow caffeine metabolism, increasing sleep disruption risk

entities.name: FTO AA Variant
entities.context: Genetic variant linked to appetite suppression risk, especially when combined with stimulants

entities.name: Protein-Forward Breakfast
entities.context: Nutritional strategy to front-load protein and counter stimulant-induced appetite suppression

entities.name: Sleep Score
entities.context: Quantified sleep metric used as morning planning input; threshold at 70
